scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && mkdir -p dist/second-tutorial && cp index.html dashboard.html learn.html product.html tutorial.html _headers favicon.ico favicon.svg kit-box-closed.png kit-box-open-1.png kit-box-open-2.png kit-box-top.png dist/ && cp second-tutorial/index.html dist/second-tutorial/
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy ./dist --project-name=firelight --branch=main
